title: Inspect staging booking, payment, and chat schema
status: COMPLETE - all preconditions classified; all FAILs are expected strategy-compliant states; no corruption or drift detected

staging.fingerprint_source: T-026 re-verification 2026-07-23; Lane C probes 2026-07-24 consistent, zero drift
staging.bookmark_surface: not exposed via d1 info or per-query meta.bookmark; T-026 Time Travel bookmark + export remain the recovery point

lane_a.note: Row count computed from the actual Lane A file (sections A:10, B:4, C:17, D:7, E:17, F:15, G:6, H:4 = 80 rows).

classification_rule.pass: Expected absence/quarantine/non-application confirmed by probes; identity/classification metadata confirmed; or contract-level design cross-check (state-matrix set comparison, FK action inspection) verified from frozen contract and lane documents.
classification_rule.fail_baseline_required: Requires schema objects (parent tables, contract tables, indexes, constraints, ledger rows) that pristine-empty staging intentionally lacks; expected, strategy-compliant state per migration-strategy.md empty-target canonical-baseline path - not corruption.
classification_rule.fail_repo_artifact_nonconformant: Repo migration artifact (008/009, or absent restitutions migration) diverges from the frozen T-011 contract; T-028 must correct before any apply.
classification_rule.not_applicable: Forward-looking process/plan/tooling gate not observable from staging state; deferred to T-028/T-029/release plan.

divergences.summary: Amount column named `amount`; contract requires `amount_satang` (integer minor unit)
divergences.classification: FAIL (repo artifact non-conformant - T-028 must correct)

divergences.summary: Missing partial unique index `uq_payment_attempt_active_booking ON payment_attempts(booking_id) WHERE status IN ('creating','indeterminate','pending')`; repo has non-unique `idx_payment_attempts_booking` instead
divergences.classification: FAIL (repo artifact non-conformant - T-028 must correct)

divergences.summary: No repo migration creates `payment_restitutions` (contract-only table, E1-E17 incl. lifecycle CHECKs E13-E15 and uniques E3/E4); T-028 must author it
divergences.classification: FAIL (repo artifact non-conformant - T-028 must correct)

divergences.summary: Forbidden renaming variant: renames legacy `chat_rooms`/`chat_messages`, reuses those names (collision with legacy tables), uses DATETIME vs contract TEXT, and `reply_to_id` lacks its self-referencing REFERENCES clause; contract requires additive `booking_chat_rooms`/`booking_chat_messages`
divergences.classification: FAIL (repo artifact non-conformant - T-028 must correct)

divergences.summary: Baseline gap: staging is pristine-empty, so FK parents `users`/`bookings` and legacy pair chat tables do not exist; canonical baseline (001-003, 004_background_jobs_tables, 005-007; excluding quarantined 004_mobile_app_features) must be generated and applied first, recorded as exactly one d1_migrations row

d1_platform_notes: PRAGMA user_version is unavailable on D1: refused with `not authorized: SQLITE_AUTH [code: 7500]` via wrangler remote execute (Lane C, staging-user-version.json) and via REST (T-025). Lineage verification must be d1_migrations-table-based; the first `wrangler d1 migrations apply` will create the ledger fresh on this database.

No bookmark-based consistency checks available from query metadata: `d1 info --json` exposes no bookmark field and per-query `meta.bookmark` was null; cross-task schema-dump fingerprinting (T-025/T-026 style) remains the drift-detection mechanism.
`_cf_KV` is Cloudflare-internal: excluded from the T-011 contract surface; must never be migrated or dropped.

Correct 008: rename amount -> amount_satang; add partial unique index uq_payment_attempt_active_booking.
Rewrite 009 as additive expand (booking_chat_rooms/booking_chat_messages; TEXT timestamps; reply_to_id self-FK; collision-free idx_booking_chat_* names with IF NOT EXISTS).
Fail-closed lineage tooling: target schema + d1_migrations only; refuse/escalate on unrecognized state; no raw replay; Wrangler ledger after disposable rehearsal (T-029).
Never rely on PRAGMA user_version (SQLITE_AUTH 7500 on D1).
